name: Root account MFA not enabled
description: The AWS root account does not have multi-factor authentication (MFA) enabled. The root account has unrestricted access to all AWS resources and should be protected with the strongest available authentication.
remediation: Enable MFA for the root account in the AWS IAM console under 'Security credentials'. Use a hardware MFA device (e.g. YubiKey) for root accounts. Avoid using virtual MFA for root.
